title: Meowmere
body: This mod has added a 'Meowmere' sword, which is a weapon from Terraria. When swinging or attacking enemies , it will shoot a rainbow cat projectiles, The cat head deals 125% of the weapon's damage, is affected by gravity, and can pierce enemies or bounce off blocks up to four times. Upon bouncing off a block, the cat head makes a "meow" sound and emits damaging rainbow explosions that grow in size with each bounce. This mod uses an open source license that allows you to include it in the mod package. If there is any infringement, please contact the author for deletion.
